prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年延边大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为12732名、12132名、13982名、18658名、16028名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2024年出现较大幅度后移至1 8658名，2025年明显回升至16028名，近两年波动幅度约2630名，显示该校在海南的录取位次存在较大弹性；2021–2025年该校在海南省综合类招生计划均为53人 ，2026年招生计划仍为53人，与2025年持平，计划无变化，对竞争格局无直接扩缩影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 延边大学为国家211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学 排名近年持续上升：2021年第198名→2022年第185名→2023年第176名→2024年第165名→2025年第168名→2026年第157名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度呈上升趋势；该校在2021–2026年声誉数据中未见明显负面舆情事件，声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第79位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现高热关注或断档信号，报考 心理层面无明显扰动；学校以朝鲜语、外国语言文学等为特色，但相关学 科评估等级数据不足。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校招生专业中，临床医学、计算机科学与技术、电子信息工程、法学等专业社会热度偏热/推荐，对高分考生有吸引力；土木工 程、机械类、化学类等专业热度偏冷或劝退。海南省2021–2025年考生总数持续增长（52977→55945→61728→65969→67408），2026年预计约78000人，较2025年增长约15.7%，考生规 模显著扩大，竞争加剧；延边大学位于吉林省延边朝鲜族自治州，距海南省较远，跨 省就读的地域偏好可能偏弱，但作为211高校对海南考生仍具一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划持平、学校排名持续上升、海南省考生规模大幅 增长（约15.7%）等因素，竞争加剧是主要驱动方向，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约15828名，区间15328–16328名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Yanbian University in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were 12,732, 12,132, 13,982, 18,658, and 16,028 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, there was a significant backward shift to 18,658, and in 2025, it rebounded to 16,028, with a fluctuation range of about 2,630 in the past two years, indicating considerable elasticity in the admission rankings of this university in Hainan. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for this university in Hainan's comprehensive category was 53 students each year, and the 2026 enrollment plan remains at 53 students, unchanged from 2025, with no direct impact on competition scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yanbian University is a national 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising in recent years: 198th in 2021 → 185th in 2022 → 176th in 2023 → 165th in 2024 → 168th in 2025 → 157th in 2026, showing a steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. There have been no significant negative public opinion incidents in the reputation data from 2021 to 2026, and the reputation remains stable. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 79th, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, no high attention or gap signals, and no obvious disturbance in the application psychology. The university is known for Korean language, foreign language and literature, but relevant discipline evaluation data is insufficient.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the university's admission majors, clinical medicine, computer science and technology, electronic information engineering, law, etc., are socially popular/recommended, attracting high-scoring students. Majors such as civil engineering, mechanical engineering, and chemistry are relatively unpopular or discouraged. The total number of examinees in Hainan Province from 2021 to 2025 has been continuously increasing (52,977 → 55,945 → 61,728 → 65,969 → 67,408), and in 2026 it is expected to be about 78,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion in examinee scale and intensified competition. Yanbian University is located in Yanbian Korean Autonomous Prefecture, Jilin Province, far from Hainan Province, so cross-provincial study preferences may be weak, but as a 211 university, it still has some appeal to Hainan examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, continuously rising university rankings, and a significant increase in Hainan's examinee scale (about 15.7%), intensified competition is the main driving direction. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 15,828, with a range of 15,328 to 16,328.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15,328 to 16,328, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, try to sprint for Tier 1 majors with lower ranking requirements (such as Korean, Geographical Sciences), and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 15,328), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors in Tier 1 such as Clinical Medicine and Computer Science and Technology.
